prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: website hero image for the School OS solution page
Primary request: premium dark SaaS illustration of a modern school operating system dashboard showing attendance, classes, staff, timetable, student records, and admin status cards in a clean product UI composition
Scene/backdrop: abstract deep navy workspace with subtle grid glow and soft gradient panels
Subject: school operations dashboard with layered cards, status indicators, and organized admin modules
Style/medium: polished 3D UI illustration, cinematic product render, high-end tech aesthetic
Composition/framing: wide landscape hero with left-side negative space for copy, central dashboard focus, no text
Lighting/mood: confident, futuristic, clean, softly luminous
Color palette: navy, slate, cyan, electric blue, soft teal
Materials/textures: glassmorphism panels, matte dark surfaces, subtle glow edges
Constraints: no words, no logos, no watermark, no people, no clutter
